title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Gunko, Unknown person #2, Children, Unknown person #3 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That damn dream demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And it's not just the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All those sea clouds got blown away with it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a mess! and I can't stop the arrow's effects!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The brats will fall and splat themselves against the mountain face!

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: GUNKO! Gunko! You gotta stop the kids!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to call off the plan for a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's no use!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Imu's in there right now, not her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to free them from this arrow!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's this made of? I'm not leaving a scratch!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Daddy!! Mommy!! Save me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's useless you fools!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that were possible, I'd be doing it myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those parents are trying to protect their children, but the thorns won't let them touch the brats...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the way things are going, they'll soon be forced to watch the kids screen to their deaths!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OH MY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a juicy way to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey wait... this kinda works out!! Since gunko is being controlled, the great one's technically responsible for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We can always snatch more brats afterward...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can hear it now!! The sweet sobbing screams of their wear parents as they'! Plummet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is gonna be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: SO TOUCHING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Attention brats and PTA members alike...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our initial plan to ship the tykes off safely to the Holy Land...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...has run into an unforeseen snafu.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship and the cloud layer have been wiped away...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
